summary: Tested 3 features related to free shipping banner and city verification. Feature 2 (Product Cart progress bar) is WORKING correctly. Features 1 and 3 could not be fully tested because the test user (0933333333) has city='دمشق' in their profile, which matches the food store city, so citiesMatch=true.

minor.issue: User 0933333333 has city='دمشق' in profile but test requirements say user should be from 'حلب'. User's saved address shows 'حلب' but profile shows 'دمشق'. Data inconsistency.

feature_1_free_shipping_banner_food_page.details: FreeShippingBanner.js correctly checks citiesMatch at line 184. Banner should NOT show when user city != store city. However, test user has city='دمشق' (same as store), so banner correctly appears. Cannot verify the hide behavior due to data setup.

feature_2_product_cart_progress_bar.details: CartPage.js correctly shows progress bar with percentage at lines 255-278. Verified in UI - shows '0%' progress with remaining amount. Screenshot confirms orange progress bar with truck icon and percentage display.

feature_3_different_cities_alert.details: FoodCartPage.js has alert code at lines 549-559 that shows when !citiesMatch. Since test user city='دمشق' matches store city='دمشق', citiesMatch=true and alert doesn't show. Code is correct but cannot test due to matching cities.

action_items: UPDATE USER DATA: Change test user (0933333333) profile city from 'دمشق' to 'حلب' to match test requirements
Alternative: Create new test user with city='حلب' to properly test city mismatch features
Re-test features 1 and 3 after fixing user data
critical_code_review_comments: FreeShippingBanner.js city check logic at lines 65-67 defaults to citiesMatch=true if either city is empty. This is safe fallback.
FoodCartPage.js citiesMatch logic at lines 230-232 is identical pattern - correct implementation
CartPage.js shipping progress bar implementation at lines 255-278 is complete with percentage display
context_for_next_testing_agent: User 0933333333 has mismatched city data: profile.city='دمشق' but addresses[0].city='حلب'. Features 1 and 3 depend on user.city != store.city to test properly. Need to fix user profile city to 'حلب' first.

verification_screenshots.product_cart_progress_bar: Screenshot shows orange progress bar at /cart page with '0%' and 'أضف X ل.س للشحن المجاني' text - Feature 2 confirmed working
verification_screenshots.free_shipping_banner: Banner appears because citiesMatch=true (both Damascus) - cannot verify hide behavior with current data
